<function=python>

after = last_transition.after_frame

before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation

print("=== BEFORE ===")
for node in before_seg['nodes']:
    b = node['boundary']
    center_r = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
    center_c = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
    print(f"  Node {node['id']}: color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, center=({center_r},{center_c}), children={node['children']}")

print("\n=== AFTER ===")
for node in after_seg['nodes']:
    b = node['boundary']
    center_r = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
    center_c = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
    print(f"  Node {node['id']}: color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, center=({center_r},{center_c}), children={node['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
